---
title: "XGBoost Model Details"
format: html
---

## XGBoost Hyperparameters

Below is a summary of the hyperparameter settings used in the final XGBoost model.

<iframe src="figures/xgboost_hyperparams.html" width="100%" height="400px"></iframe>

---

## SHAP Interpretation

We used SHAP (SHapley Additive Explanations) to interpret the contribution of each feature.

- SHAP summary plots show the relative influence of each predictor.
- Interaction plots visualize how governance metrics moderate FDI’s effect.

You can explore the visualizations [here](ml.qmd).
